Items.Title: 用于创建高质量图像的 5 大人工智能图像生成工具 | Top 5 AI-Powered Image Generation Tools for Creating High-Quality Images
Items.Description:
随着人工智能 (AI) 的进步，图像生成变得比以往任何时候都容易。 今天，有许多可用的人工智能图像生成工具，只需点击几下并以文本格式描述图像，就可以创建高质量的图像。 这些工具使用复杂的机器学习算法来创建看起来逼真且视觉效果惊人的图像。 无论您是平面设计师、摄影师还是艺术家，这些工具都可以帮助您快速轻松地创建令人惊叹的图像。 在此博客中，我们将探讨 5 大人工智能图像生成工具，它们可以帮助您为项目创建高质量的图像。

达尔-E 2

该工具使用基于转换器的语言模型和神经渲染引擎，根据给定的描述创建逼真的复杂图像。 它是理解给予它的描述的上下文并创建更接近提示的图像的最佳工具之一。 它可以具有本质上不是很艺术但在给予它的提示方面更准确的图像。 它每月提供 15 个免费积分，您可以使用它生成图像并使用修复和修复等功能对其进行编辑。 您可以使用文本和图像的组合作为输入来创建图像。

链接-labs.openai.com/

中途

它生成高质量的图像，您需要通过 Discord 登录。 它为用户提供 25 个免费积分。 您可以使用 Midjourney 来改进图像并调整图像质量。 它还可以将图像和文本作为输入来创建图像。 它有一个庞大的 Discord 社区，可帮助您探索该工具。 它以制作如此高质量的艺术图像而著称，以至于从中生成的图像曾经在艺术比赛中获胜。 唯一的缺点是它有时会忽略提示中的某些方面以创建更好看的图像。 它更注重艺术风格和图像质量，而不是提示的准确性。

链接- www.midjourney.com/home/

夜间咖啡厅

它有一个网站，您可以在其中点赞、评论和分享图片，还可以将其作为 NFT 出售。 您还可以获得图像的打印版本。 这个网站最好的地方是它有基于游戏的方法，你可以通过执行不同的任务获得免费积分，例如喜欢、评论、关注等。你可以在这里关注你最喜欢的创作者，并直接将你的艺术分享到 Instagram 等社交媒体和推特。 它具有预定义的提示，可帮助新手创建质量更好的图像，而不必担心 DALL-E 和 Midjourney 所需的提示工程概念。 它每天都面临在其网站上竞争的挑战。 这个网站的修复功能不好。

链接- creator.nightcafe.studio/

稳定扩散

它还具有涂漆功能。 如果您精通深度学习，您可以训练自己的稳定扩散模型，因为代码是开源的。

链接- beta.dreamstudio.ai/dream

梦想亭

您可以训练自己的模型，通过提供 10-15 张您自己的图像来创建您自己的 AI 化身。

链接- huggingface.co/spaces/multimodalart/dre ...



原文:

With advancements in Artificial Intelligence (AI), image generation has become easier than ever before. Today, there are a number of AI-powered image generation tools available that can create high-quality images with just a few clicks and description of the image in textual format. These tools use sophisticated machine learning algorithms to create images that look realistic and visually stunning. Whether you are a graphic designer, photographer, or artist, these tools can help you create amazing images quickly and easily. In this blog, we will explore the top 5 AI-powered image generation tools that can help you create high-quality images for your projects.

DALL-E 2

DALL-E 2 is an image generation tool created by OpenAI, which can generate images from textual descriptions. This tool uses a transformer-based language model and a neural rendering engine to create realistic and complex images based on the given description. It is one of the best tools to understand the context of description given to it and creates images which are more closer to the prompt. It can have images which are not very artistic in nature but are more accurate in terms of prompt given to it. DALL-E 2 has features like inpainting and outpainting which makes it one of the best AI art generators and helps people explore there creativity. It provides 15 free credits each month and you can use it generate images and edit it with features like inpainting and outpainting. You can use combination of text and image as input to create images.

LINK- labs.openai.com/

Midjourney

Midjourney is better in terms of quality of images and generates the best quality artistic images. It generates images in high quality and you need to login to it through Discord. It gives 25 free credits for the user. You can use Midjourney to evolve images and scale the quality of images. It can also take both images and text as input to create images. It has a large Discord community which helps you in exploring the tool. It has distinction of making such high quality artistic image that once an image generated from it won in an Art competition. The only drawback is that it sometimes ignores certain aspects of your prompt to create better looking images. It is focused more on artistic style and quality of image than accuracy to the prompt.

LINK- www.midjourney.com/home/

NightCafe

NightCafe is another website which has an awesome community and has many different algorithms like DALLE, Stable diffusion, VQGAN+CLIP and CLIP-Guided Diffusion to create AI generated images. It has a website where you can like, comment and share images and also sell it as an NFT. You can also get a printed version of your images. The best thing about this website is that it has game based approach where you get free credits for different tasks you perform such as like, comment, follow, etc. You can follow your favourite creators here and directly share your art to social media like Instagram and Twitter. It has predefined prompts which help newbies to create better quality images without getting worried about prompt engineering concepts which are required for DALL-E and Midjourney. It has daily challenges to compete on its website. The inpainting feature is not good in this website.

LINK- creator.nightcafe.studio/

Stable diffusion

Stable diffusion is an open source AI art generation tool developed by Stability.ai and is almost comparable to DALL-E in terms of accuracy. Dreamstudio is the web Ui for Stable diffusion to generate images. It also has feature of outpainting. If you are well versed in Deep learning you can train your own stable diffusion model as the code is open source.

LINK- beta.dreamstudio.ai/dream

Dreambooth

Dreambooth is another open source Ai art generation tool which is mostly focused on modifying style of different objects and using the transfer learning concept. You can train your own model to create AI avatars of yourself by giving just 10-15 images of yours.

LINK- huggingface.co/spaces/multimodalart/dre…
Items.Author: amananandrai

Items.Description:
一旦暂停，fpaghar 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，fpaghar 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，fpaghar 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 fpaghar 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是您可以用来标记 fpaghar 的操作：

降低 fpaghar 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

Items.Title: 僵尸枪战 PICO-8 游戏 | Zombie Gun War PICO-8 Game
Items.Description:
一之濑贵根

发表于 3 月 1 日

僵尸枪战

控件

  • 向上箭头键：将菜单移至上方
  • 向下箭头键：将菜单移动到下方
  • 左箭头键：向左移动
  • 右箭头键：向右移动
  • 描述

    用这个游戏测试你的反应！ 与电脑战斗，射击你的火球，或者躲避电脑的火球。 无论如何，只是想赢过电脑。

    这个游戏的规则很简单。 你可以向左或向右移动，然后用“z”键或“O”键发射火球。

    我使用 PICO-8 创建了这个游戏。 幻想游戏机启发了 80 年代的游戏机。

    这个游戏有3个难点

    • 简单：电脑会随机发射火球。
    • 中：闪避阈值和移动响应较高。
    • 硬：闪避阈值和移动响应要高得多。

一旦暂停，takaneichinose 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，takaneichinose 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，takaneichinose 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 takaneichinose 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 takaneichinose：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 takaneichinose 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Takane Ichinose

Posted on Mar 1

takaneichinose.itch.io/zombie-gun-war

Zombie Gun War

Controls

  • Up arrow key: Move menu to above
  • Down arrow key: Move menu to below
  • Left arrow key: Move left
  • Right arrow key: Move right
  • Z: The 'O' button (Select from menu, or shoot fireball)

Description

Test your reflexes with this game! Fight with the computer, shoot your fire ball, or dodge the computer's fire ball. Anyway, just try to win against the computer.

The rule of this game is simple. You may just move left, or right, then shoot fireball with 'z' key or 'O' button.

I created this game using PICO-8. A fantasy console inspired the game console in the 80s.

There are 3 difficulties in this game

  • Easy: The computer will shoot fireball randomly.
  • Medium: The dodge threshold and move response is higher.
  • Hard: The dodge threshold and move response is much higher.

Pubudu Jayawardana - Feb 24
